generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures real-time occupancy data for adaptive control policies and energy optimization. Integrated into BIM model for post-occupancy analysis via BOREALIS reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures indoor temperature for HVAC control and energy efficiency optimization. Data ingested via Eclipse Hono for real-time synchronization with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LuminositySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors lighting levels for TwinLight adaptive control and BOREALIS visual comfort optimization. Feeds real-time data to Ditto for bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminosityDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks energy consumption of building systems (lighting, HVAC) for predictive analytics and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingControlSystemSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Aggregates data from Building Control Systems (BCS) for operational monitoring and control logic execution."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BcsDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LuminosityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminositySensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance BcsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingControlSystemSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically rich 3D representation of the building incorporating geometric, spatial, and functional data (IFC standards). Serves as the semantic backbone for device metadata extraction and control logic embedding."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoConfigurator, DittoConfigurator, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance RuntimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from sensors, BCS, and user interactions ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for digital twin synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, LuminosityDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted, BcsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance LightingControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded TwinLight control semantics for lighting systems including user-centered strategies and adaptive policies."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BOREALIS RL policies for dynamic optimization of energy, comfort, and health effects using post-occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D representation rendered by Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance DeviceMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted from BIM to configure Hono/Ditto including device IDs, tenant IDs, and endpoint addresses for bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BcsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoConfigurator, DittoConfigurator
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT middleware for real-time data ingestion from sensors and devices supporting MQTT/AMQP protocols. Enables low-latency synchronization between physical and virtual systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management framework enabling bidirectional communication, lifecycle management, and standardized data models (Thing Model)."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, LifeCycleManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides rich, interactive 3D visualization for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, SimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates extraction of domain semantics from BIM and generation of runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations) via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService, ConfigurationGenerationService
]

instance HonoConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scans BIM model for 'twinnable' devices and extracts metadata to establish bidirectional communication channels via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance DittoConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Configures Eclipse Ditto instances with device metadata and standardized interfaces for digital twin management."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS RL engine for adaptive control policies optimizing energy, comfort, and health effects using post-occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building operations using real-time sensor data and BCS feedback."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOperationalInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimization recommendations based on reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) and control logic (TwinLight) for energy and comfort."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendation, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building operations enabling facility managers to interact with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationDashboardInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supports what-if analyses and long-term planning through interactive 3D simulations of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationAnalysisInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automates deployment of digital twins by extracting device metadata from BIM and generating runtime interfaces for Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentArtifactAction
]

instance LifeCycleManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "End-to-end building life cycle management from design (BIM) to operation (real-time data) with adaptive adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides LifeCycleInsight
]

instance ConfigurationGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates deployable artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations, Unreal Engine visualizations) from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigurationArtifactAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeOperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live dashboards showing energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and system performance for facility managers."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven suggestions for lighting adjustments, HVAC schedules, and energy efficiency improvements."
]

instance VisualizationDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations enabling cross-disciplinary decision-making."
]

instance SimulationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from what-if analyses and long-term planning simulations for refurbishment and optimization strategies."
]

instance LifeCycleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "End-to-end building life cycle monitoring from design to operation with adaptive adjustments."
]

instance DeploymentArtifactAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of deployable configurations for Hono/Ditto and Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of RL hyperparameters in BOREALIS based on performance feedback."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ConfigurationArtifactAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of runtime interfaces and visualization models from BIM metadata."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled lighting system capable of executing control actions (e.g., adjusting lighting levels) based on TwinLight and BOREALIS policies."
]

instance HvacActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for regulating temperature and air quality based on real-time sensor data and optimization policies."
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized system integrating actuators, controllers, and IoT devices for building automation and energy management."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **bidirectional communication** between the DT and the physical building, where the DT generates **control signals, optimization commands, or adaptive policies** that are executed by the Building Control Systems (BCS). The **TwinLight** project demonstrates this via **automated commissioning** and **user-centered control strategies** embedded in BIM models, which are translated into runtime commands for lighting systems. The **BOREALIS** project uses **reinforcement learning (RL)** to dynamically adjust lighting parameters based on real-time sensor feedback, feeding optimized control policies back to the physical system. These interactions are facilitated by **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, which relay commands via **standardized protocols** (e.g., MQTT, CoAP) to actuators and controllers in the physical building."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is **real-time** for core synchronization tasks (e.g., sensor data ingestion, control signal execution) and **adaptive** for higher-level services like **reinforcement learning-based optimization (BOREALIS)**. The **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** middleware ensures **low-latency data exchange** (millisecond to second-scale) for operational monitoring and control. For **predictive analytics and RL-based adjustments**, the time scale may extend to **minutes or hours**, depending on the complexity of the optimization task. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **temporal fidelity** of the DT’s synchronization with the physical building."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented architecture** centered around the **BIM model** and **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**. The constellation includes:
  - **Core components**: BIM model (semantic backbone), Hono/Ditto (real-time data exchange), Unreal Engine 5 (visualization).
  - **Acting components**: Building Control Systems (BCS), actuators (e.g., lighting, HVAC), and **reinforcement learning controllers (BOREALIS)**.
  - **Sensing components**: IoT sensors (e.g., temperature, occupancy, luminosity) and **user interaction data**.
  - **Extension points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating **custom services** (e.g., analytics, simulation tools) developed by **DT Engineers**.
  - **Orchestration**: The **DT Framework** acts as a central hub, facilitating **bidirectional data exchange** between physical assets and their digital counterparts while supporting **runtime configuration management** for adaptability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life cycle stages** covered by the DT include:
  1. **Design phase**: Leverages **BIM models** to represent the building as-designed, including geometric, spatial, and functional attributes of components.
  2. **Construction phase**: Supports **clash detection, simulation, and documentation** via BIM, though real-time synchronization is limited until operational systems are deployed.
  3. **Operation phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** using **sensor data, BCS feedback, and reinforcement learning (BOREALIS)**. The DT evolves alongside the physical building, accommodating **refurbishments and adaptations** through runtime configuration management.
  4. **End-of-life phase**: Facilitates **decommissioning planning and data archiving** by maintaining historical records of the building’s digital representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are assessed using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which measures the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart. The framework addresses **semantic drift** (divergence between digital and physical representations) through **real-time synchronization** and **automated validation** of BIM models. Quality assurance is embedded in the **model-driven deployment pipeline**, ensuring consistency and interoperability across the DT life cycle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and the DT is established using **Eclipse Hono** (for IoT data ingestion) and **Ditto** (for digital twin management). Communication relies on **tenant and device IDs** or **endpoint addresses** extracted from BIM models. The framework supports **bidirectional, real-time data exchange** between sensors/actuators and the DT, enabling seamless synchronization. No specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) or formats (e.g., JSON, IFC) are explicitly detailed beyond the use of Hono/Ditto."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT engineering follows **AECO-specific standards such as BIM** and leverages **standardized integration mechanisms** for interoperability. The framework emphasizes **semantic standardization** through BIM’s object-based modeling and **modular service integration** via extension points. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, MQTT) are not explicitly mentioned, the approach aligns with **open-source DT frameworks** (e.g., Eclipse Hono, Ditto) and **model-driven engineering principles** for consistency."
]
